# DryUI — Get Started

Zero-dependency Svelte 5 component library. Install the package, apply two setup
steps, and start using components.

## Step 1: Install

```
npx @dryui/cli init
```

Or manually:

```
npm install @dryui/ui
```

## Step 2: Import theme CSS in your root layout

```svelte
<script>
  import '@dryui/ui/themes/default.css';
  import '@dryui/ui/themes/dark.css';
</script>
```

## Step 3: Enable automatic light/dark theming

In your `app.html` (SvelteKit) or root HTML file, add the `theme-auto` class:

```html
<html class="theme-auto">
```

## Step 4: Use components

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button } from '@dryui/ui';
</script>

<Button>Click me</Button>
```

## CLI (optional)

```
npm install -g @dryui/cli
```

Useful commands:

- `dryui list` — list all available components
- `dryui info <component>` — show a component's full API reference
- `dryui compose <query>` — get composition guidance for a UI pattern
- `dryui review <file.svelte>` — validate a Svelte file against the DryUI spec
- `dryui doctor` — inspect workspace health

## Full reference

See https://dryui.dev/llms.txt for the complete component API reference.
